sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, strpljenje je ključ uspjeha.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, patience is the key to success.

sentences.arabic: حِينَ أَقَعُ فِي مُشْكِلَةٍ أَتَنَفَّسُ بِعُمْقٍ وَأَفَكِّرُ بِهُدُوءٍ.
sentences.translation: Kada upadnem u problem, duboko dišem i mirno razmišljam.
sentences.translationEn: When I fall into a problem I breathe deeply and think calmly.

sentences.arabic: الصَّبْرُ يَجْعَلُنَا نَرَى الْأَشْيَاءَ بِشَكْلٍ أَوْضَحَ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje nam omogućava da vidimo stvari jasnije.
sentences.translationEn: Patience makes us see things more clearly.
